/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/graphviz/lib CMakeFiles/watcher.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watcher.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watcher.dir/src/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watcher.dir/src/listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watcher.dir/src/dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watcher.dir/src/rules/rule_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watcher.dir/src/handlers/sensor_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watcher.dir/src/handlers/signal_handler.cpp.o -o watcher  /opt/homebrew/lib/postgresql@17/libpq.dylib -lpthread _deps/pugixml-build/libpugixml.a
